__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Nefertiti Bust,ENIAC Prototype,Behistun Inscription,ARPAnet
|rank=purple
|amount=4
|category=self
|description=Per 500 DNA Strength, Snail RUSH +4<br>DNA Strength: 20,000/20,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by DNA Strength]]
